name: HWM_TM_OPM_MEANING_V
query: SELECT to_char(org_payment_method_id) Code, org_payment_method_name Meaning FROM pay_org_pay_methods_vl opm where opm.org_payment_method_id IN( SELECT opm_use.org_payment_method_id FROM pay_org_pay_method_usages_f opm_use, pay_rel_groups_dn asg, pay_assigned_payrolls_dn pap, pay_all_payrolls_f ppp, pay_assigned_payrolls_f papf, pay_pay_relationships_dn ppr /* payroll relationship */ WHERE opm_use.payroll_id = pap.payroll_id and asg.parent_rel_group_id = pap.payroll_term_id and pap.payroll_id = ppp.payroll_id and pap.start_date between ppp.effective_start_date and ppp.effective_end_date and papf.assigned_payroll_id=pap.assigned_payroll_id and asg.PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID= ppr.PAYROLL_RELATIONSHIP_ID) order by org_payment_method_name
